\tzpentry{ID4208}{Potential Energy Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4208 introduces Potential Energy Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{U}_{\text{total}} = \int_{\mathcal{M}} \left[\frac{B^2}{2\mu_0} + \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{\lambda_n}{n!}\mathcal{L}_n[B]\right] \sqrt{g} \, d^4x \end{equation}
